tasks.label: Wait for Eureka
args: timeout=120; elapsed=0; echo 'Esperando a Eureka Server en http://localhost:8761 ...'; while [ $elapsed -lt $timeout ]; do status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:8761/actuator/health); if [ $status -eq 200 ]; then echo 'Eureka Server esta listo!'; exit 0; fi; sleep 3; elapsed=$((elapsed + 3)); echo "  ... $elapsed s"; done; echo 'TIMEOUT: Eureka no respondio'; exit 1
